Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Flash-KMeans: Fast and Memory-Efficient Exact K-Means 154 upvotes, 12 comments
  2. The Social Smolnet 92 upvotes, 11 comments
  3. Attention Residuals 64 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. ArXiv declares independence from Cornell 685 upvotes, 235 comments
  5. The Soul of a Pedicab Driver 126 upvotes, 35 comments
  6. Delve – Fake Compliance as a Service 409 upvotes, 137 comments
  7. The bespoke software revolution? I'm not buying it 46 upvotes, 10 comments
  8. Randomization in Controlled Experiments 18 upvotes, 2 comments
  9. Entso-E final report on Iberian 2025 blackout 159 upvotes, 60 comments
  10. Video Encoding and Decoding with Vulkan Compute Shaders in FFmpeg 135 upvotes, 51 comments
  11. Regex Blaster 124 upvotes, 48 comments
  12. VisiCalc Reconstructed 138 upvotes, 56 comments
  13. Super Micro Shares Plunge 25% After Co-Founder Charged in $2.5B Smuggling Plot 271 upvotes, 124 comments
  14. FSF statement on copyright infringement lawsuit Bartz v. Anthropic 230 upvotes, 110 comments
  15. Parallel Perl – autoparallelizing interpreter with JIT 79 upvotes, 32 comments
  16. NumKong: 2'000 Mixed Precision Kernels for All 6 upvotes, 0 comments
  17. The Los Angeles Aqueduct Is Wild 246 upvotes, 132 comments
  18. Just Put It on a Map 126 upvotes, 62 comments
  19. Show HN: I made an email app inspired by Arc browser 17 upvotes, 4 comments
  20. Show HN: Sonar – A tiny CLI to see and kill whatever's running on localhost 115 upvotes, 62 comments
  21. Too Much Color 94 upvotes, 50 comments
  22. A Japanese Glossary of Chopsticks Faux Pas 13 upvotes, 3 comments
  23. HP trialed mandatory 15-minute support call wait times (2025) 289 upvotes, 185 comments
  24. OpenCode – The open source AI coding agent 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  25. Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis 18 upvotes, 6 comments
  26. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app 383 upvotes, 330 comments
  27. Java is fast, code might not be 167 upvotes, 170 comments
  28. Meme Buildings 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Launch HN: Sitefire (YC W26) – Automating actions to improve AI visibility 25 upvotes, 20 comments
  30. Our commitment to Windows quality 138 upvotes, 190 comments

Last generated 5:30am, 21 March 2026. Source here.
